title: LocationState
description: Dynamic processing state for one location. Updated every run. Stored in locations/state.json (JSON at small scale; migrate to SQLite for the national rollout).

location_id.description: Foreign key to a location in the registry.

status.description: Position in the pipeline state machine. See docs/ARCHITECTURE.md for transitions.

last_run.description: UTC timestamp of the most recent discovery run.

next_due.description: When this location should next be processed (derived from cadence).

coverage.description: Fraction of enumerated entities with at least one confident source.

quality_score.description: Aggregate confidence across verified sources for the latest run.

latest_run.description: Run-timestamp folder name of the current run, e.g. 20260701T184158Z. Points into output/<location_id>/.

last_discovered.description: UTC timestamp of the most recent completed DISCOVERY run for this location. Answers 'when did we last look for sources here' without opening output files.

last_scraped.description: UTC timestamp of the most recent completed SCRAPE run for this location. Answers 'when did we last extract leads here'.

latest_discovery_run.description: Run folder of the most recent discovery run (latest_run can point at either stage).

latest_scrape_run.description: Run folder of the most recent scrape run.

lease.description: Concurrency lock so two runs cannot grab the same location at once.

notes.description: Free text, e.g. why the location is blocked.
